title: BlockBound: For Forge
description: Modpack that adds more than 100 Mods with Adventure, Boss, Dungeons, Nether/End Expansions, Better Visuals Resource Packs with better animations and more.
body:
## BlockBound Description: What does this Modpack offer?

BlockBound: For Forge is a Forge Modpack (Obviously) focused on visual upgrades, immersive animations, Bosses, More mobs, structures, dimensions and quality-of-life improvements. it includes over 100 Mods, combing popular classics like Mowzie's mobs, Alex Mob's, Cataclysm or The Aether, with plenty of newer content to expand exploration, combat, and also building.

It features Shaders and Texture Packs too. ( Example ) including Fresh animations, hold my items, Mob Revamp Models all that kind of stuff, and other visual enhancements that make the game feel smoother and more alive. ( Mostly Mods ) Great for players who want a better-looking Minecraft experience without changing the core gameplay TOO much.


## Bugs or Issues

If you got ANY bugs, issues with downloading, booting up, joining a world or Resource pack incompatibilities or anything like that, join my discord server to ask any question on the blockbound-forge channel.
